articles.title: Ripple's XRP sees decline as realized profits reach record levels
articles.description: Ripple's XRP is down 6% on Tuesday following record profit-taking among investors as its percentage of total supply in profit reached very high levels in the past week.

articles.title: Bitwise files for Bitcoin-Ethereum ETF with SEC, plans NYSE launch
articles.description: Bitwise Asset Management has filed a proposal with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a joint Bitcoin-Ethereum exchange-traded fund (ETF). If approved, the ETF will give investors exposure to the two largest cryptocurrencies without requiring them to hold the assets directly. The plan is to list the ETF on NYSE Arca, though the […]

articles.title: Cardano implements first ZK smart contract
articles.description: Cardano has successfully launched its first zero-knowledge (ZK) smart contract on the mainnet, marking a major accomplishment. The transaction was done by Input Output with the use of Halo 2 zkSNARK technology and proves Cardano’s focus on innovation and scalability in the field of blockchain. Sebastien Guillemot, the co-founder of dcSpark, said that this transaction […]

articles.title: Cardano Fans Skeptical After BitcoinOS Token Reveal
articles.description: Cardano fans express concerns over BitcoinOS’ BOS token release, questioning its necessity in the Grail Bridge.

articles.title: Bitcoin reserve bill introduced in Brazil
articles.description: Bitcoin adoption could get another boost from Brazil. This is after a Brazilian Congressman introduced a bill proposing adoption of BTC as national reserve asset. US lawmakers are also pushing for a Bitcoin strategic reserve. A Congressman in Brazil has introduced a Bitcoin reserve bill, adding the country to a growing list of nations looking […] The post Bitcoin reserve bill introduced in...

articles.title: Cardano Founder Predicts a Future of Hybrid Apps with Bitcoin and ADA Integration
articles.description: TL;DR Charles Hoskinson proposes an ecosystem of hybrid apps that allow Bitcoin to be used directly in DeFi applications, without the need for other tokens. The integration between Cardano and Bitcoin would include the use of babel fees, enabling users to pay fees in BTC. The initiative would rely on the BitcoinOS Grail bridge, although ... Read more

articles.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson advocates for Bitcoin-powered DeFi ecosystem
articles.description: Cardano blockchain founder Charles Hoskinson has shared a vision of building an “ecosystem of hybrid apps powered by DeFi-enabled Bitcoin.” In a Nov. 26 post on X (formerly Twitter), Hoskinson highlighted his renewed interest in Bitcoin’s foundational code while noting that adding a DeFi layer to the top digital asset could restore its innovative edge. articles.title: Cardano to Power Bitcoin With DeFi, Announces Charles Hoskinson
articles.description: Cardano creator Charles Hoskinson unveils ambitious plan to integrate decentralized finance into Bitcoin, bridging two blockchain giants

articles.description: Cardano (ADA) price has soared beyond the $1 mark after increasing its value by almost 200% in the last month. articles.title: Donald Trump Holds Over $5.4M in Crypto, Largest by a U.S. President, with Ethereum as Top Asset
articles.description: Donald Trump, the President-elect of the United States, reportedly holds over $5.4 million in cryptocurrency.

articles.description: For some investors, Cardano’s recent dip below $1 might seem catastrophic. However, ADA bulls appear unfazed by the slight decline, as on-chain data suggests they may be gearing up for another sustained uptrend. articles.title: Elon Musk's Doge Meme Sparks Debate Over Market Manipulation
articles.description: Elon Musk's recent Dogecoin-themed meme raised questions about potential market manipulation, following a brief surge in the coin's value after his post.

articles.title: Rumble Invests $20 Million in Bitcoin
articles.description: Rumble is investing $20 million in Bitcoin to hedge against inflation and expanding its gaming division with a controversial deal with Dr. Disrespect.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation Sends ETH To Kraken In $19.45M Transfer
articles.description: Ethereum Foundation sends ETH to Kraken, transferring 5,597 ETH worth $19.45M, as tracked by Lookonchain, from an address linked to the foundation.

articles.title: Movement developers plan token generation event on Ethereum ahead of mainnet launch
articles.description: Movement has introduced its native MOVE token, which will play a key role in its ecosystem, with a supply of 10 billion tokens.
